hero.description: We set up reliable tests that can be executed manually or automatically on every commit (CI/CD), and prepare structured video demonstrations of key workflows in your web application.

problem.label: Problem
problem.title: Common issues with web applications
problem.description: Without structured testing and clear instructions, errors, confusion and time loss quickly arise.
items: You only notice errors when users report them
Testing is done manually and unclear
New employees or users don't know how to use the system
You keep explaining the same things over the phone or email
No clear record of key workflows (registration, invoicing, settings...)

services.title: What we set up for you

items.title: Automated testing for web applications
items.description: We set up automated tests for key functionalities of your application, such as login, purchases, forms, settings and other important processes. Tests can be run manually or automatically on every update commit via CI/CD system.

items.title: Stable and repeatable testing
items.description: Each key workflow is precisely defined and verified. This way, you immediately see if an error occurred on the first upgrade, without additional manual checking.

items.title: System usage video demonstrations
items.description: We prepare clear and visual demonstrations of your application usage. Video tutorials are ideal for user support, internal documentation or feature presentations.

selenium.title: How do automated tests work?
selenium.description: Automated tests powered by Playwright simulate real user interactions with your web application. The system automatically opens the page, performs key actions (e.g. login, form submission, creating records) and verifies that everything works correctly.

insteadOfManual.title: Instead of manual checking
insteadOfManual.description: Instead of someone manually checking if login works, registration is successful, purchase or other functionality works, an automated system does this.

howItWorks.title: How does it work?
howItWorks.description: The test "opens" your website, clicks buttons, fills forms and checks if everything works correctly. If an error occurs, the system immediately alerts you, before your users notice it.

clearReports.title: Clear reports
clearReports.description: At the end of the test, a clear list of steps where the test failed is also displayed, which allows quick troubleshooting.

form.title: Registration
form.name: Name
form.welcomeDescription: You have successfully registered in the application.

videoTutorials.title: Application usage video tutorials
videoTutorials.description: While running automated tests, we can also create a video demonstration of your web application usage. The program slowly executes key steps and creates a clear visual guide that you can use for onboarding, documentation or feature presentation.

steps.title: Test automatically executes steps
steps.description: The program automatically executes steps through your web application: opens pages, clicks buttons and fills forms.

steps.title: Process is recorded
steps.description: During test execution, the entire application usage flow is recorded.

steps.title: Visual guides
steps.description: The recording can be used as a practical guide for users.

steps.title: Double benefit
steps.description: You get an automated test that checks application functionality, while also getting a clear video demonstration of usage.

statistics.title: Automation results
statistics.description: With test automation you achieve measurable results that improve the quality and reliability of your application.

items.description: With automation you reduce manual functionality checking.
Tests can be run on every commit or on schedule.
Reliability and consistency of automated tests on every execution.

targetAudience.title: Who is the service for
targetAudience.description: Our services are tailored to different companies that need reliable and automated testing of their web applications.

items.title: Companies with their own web application

items.title: E-commerce store owners

items.title: Growing startups

items.title: Development teams

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions about automated testing

questions.question: What does "key business scenario" mean?
questions.answer: A key business scenario is the entire user flow from start to finish, for example: user login, registration, adding a product to cart or completing a purchase. These are real processes that are important for the operation and revenue of your application.

questions.question: What is the difference between a test and its steps?
questions.answer: One test can contain multiple steps (clicks, data entry, checks). For example: user login usually contains 5-8 steps, while the entire purchase process can contain 10-15 steps. The test covers the entire scenario, not a single click.

questions.question: Do tests run automatically?
questions.answer: Yes. Tests are automated and can be run locally or via CI/CD system (e.g. on every new deploy). This enables quick error detection without manual testing.

questions.question: Can you see tests when they run?
questions.answer: Yes. Tests run in a real browser, so you can see every step as it executes – clicks, data entry, page navigation and all interactions. You can adjust the execution speed, so tests can run quickly in the background or slower for better visibility. This enables easy debugging and understanding what happens at every moment.

questions.question: What happens if the application changes?
questions.answer: If there are changes in the user interface or logic, tests need to be adjusted. That's why we also offer monthly maintenance, where we take care of test stability over time.

questions.question: Can we add additional scenarios later?
questions.answer: Of course. Test coverage can be expanded at any time based on application development or new features.

questions.question: How long does project execution take?
questions.answer: Execution time depends on application complexity. Most projects are completed in 2-4 weeks.

questions.question: How do we start cooperation?
questions.answer: We start with a short technical review of the application, where we identify key business workflows. Based on this, we prepare a customized offer.
